steps.title: Spot the appositive definition
steps.content: The underlined portion “(a chemical compound usable as a detergent)” follows the word surfactant and acts as an appositive that tells readers exactly what a surfactant is.

steps.title: Apply the clue to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A says the phrase clarifies the meaning of a scientific term, which matches the appositive’s role of defining surfactant.
The other three either describe something not discussed, attribute significance, or mention confusion, none of which fit the clarifying function.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
